name: Carousel
description: A section that displays items sequentially, typically one slide at a time, with controls for navigating between slides and optionally controlling automatic rotation.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus through interactive elements in the carousel
Moves focus to previous interactive element in the carousel

roles.description: Identifies the carousel as a landmark
Identifies each slide as a group
Groups the tab elements for slide selection
Used instead of group for tabbed variant

required_attributes.description: Provides accessible name for the carousel

optional_attributes.description: Set to 'polite' when not auto-rotating; 'off' during auto-rotation
Set to false so only changed content is announced
true on the currently displayed slide's picker control

notes: Auto-rotating carousels MUST have a visible pause/stop control
Auto-rotation must stop when any element in the carousel receives focus or on hover
Prefer the tabbed variant when the number of slides is small and visible tab controls are appropriate
